name: Bill Hagerty
subject: ICYMI: Bill Hagerty Joins Fox News With Tucker Carlson
body:
Peter,Last night, I joined Fox News' Tucker Carlson Tonight to talk about the need to hold China accountable for the Wuhan virus and how to hit them where it hurts, by bringing our supply chains home.Watch the clip [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pduhljy-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pduhljy-fuutjhhtj-y/) See more content like this **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pduhljy-fuutjhhtj-j/)** I'm proud to be endorsed by President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, Senator Marsha Blackburn and Senator Tom Cotton. In the Senate, I'll continue to work with them to hold China accountable and make Made in the USA the theme of our nation again.Best,
Bill

name: Team Fitzgerald
subject: more vandalism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
We won't let it stop us. Will you help us fight back? No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pduwjt-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pduwjt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,The tolerant, compassionate liberals are at it again - first in Madison, now it's spread to Lake Mills. This time, they took out their anger on a Fitzgerald for Congress yard sign, spray-painting "PIG" on it.This could be a reference to Fitzgerald's proud and consistent support of law enforcement, and if so, that's something that isn't going to change! We're not going to let a little paint stop us.If you're with us, there are two great ways to fight back. First, you can help contribute to the volunteers who put up and replace these yard signs when they're damaged: [Support Fitzgerald for Congress - $5](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pduwjt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Support Fitzgerald for Congress - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pduwjt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Second, you can put up a Fitzgerald yard sign of your own:Pickup locations:
> **Republican Party of Waukesha County**
> 1701 Pearl St. #5
> Waukesha
> Hours:
> Monday, Tuesday, Friday 9-5
> Wednesday & Thursday 9-7
> Saturday 9-noon

> Germantown

> Monday-Friday 9-4

> 130 Center Street
> Whitewater
> Hours:
> Tuesday and Wednesday 10am to 2pm
Or, if you'd like a sign delivered to you, send an email to Staff@FitzgeraldForCongress.com and we'd be happy to arrange it for you. Thanks -Team Fitzgerald

name: Barack Obama
subject: I believe in you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I've said before, when times get tough, we don't give up. We get up. |
---
[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d0b89/3449710542/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020-headercountdown?refcode=julyheadercountdowntest&amount=25")
[](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS") Peter,

When I joined Joe for a virtual grassroots fundraiser last month, I said, "_whatever you 've done so far is not enough._"

I meant it, Peter. And I'm being forthright in calling on all of us to do more, and getting our friends and neighbors in Pennsylvania to do more, because I believe in the power of people who care about our future -- and that includes you.

We're living through incredible challenges. And Republicans aren't up to the job. Their failure has cost lives and livelihoods on an unprecedented scale.

But as I've said before, when times get tough, we don't give up. **We get up**. And that's why it's so important that each and every one of us does more and more with every passing day to elect Joe as our next president. There's nobody I would have rather had by my side during my presidency. And now we've got to have his back as he wages a battle for the soul of America.

Peter, Joe's team is setting an ambitious $8 million July end-of-month fundraising goal. This is an important moment to take your commitment to this campaign to the next level because an investment of even $5 made in Joe Biden today will pay off for generations to come.

[**So I 'm humbly asking you, Peter, will you do just a little bit more today and pitch in that $5 to help Joe Biden win the most important election of our lifetime?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

I hope you feel the urgency of this moment as much as I do, Peter.

And I hope that you never discount the power that your actions can have to move this country forward. I know you've heard me say it before, but you can change the world.

So join me, and let's send Joe back to the White House to build the America that we dream about for our children. **Pitch in what you can to his campaign today here:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Obama-End-of-Month**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS")

Thank you,

Barack Obama

P.S. Remember when wearing a tan suit was the biggest controversy of the week? I wish it were the same today. (And I still maintain that suit looked good.) But if we elect Joe Biden, I know we can restore trust in our government, and transform this country for the better. [**Please donate what you can today to help him win.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d0878/3449710542/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d0876/3449710542/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d0875/3449710542/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d0873/3449710542/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d0871/3449710542/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d086f/3449710542/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d0875/3449710542/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b97b/1cd0ac28/176761723/357d086a/3449710542/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Terry Neese
subject: Are you with Vice President Pence?
body:
We're depending on your support... [](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdduutl-elutjhyju-r/) Dear Friend,Just weeks ahead of our primary election, I am so honored to receive a $1,500 contribution from Vice President Mike Pence.

The Vice President's support means the world to me, but I want to show him that our grassroots campaign can match it.Will you help **match Vice President Pence's contribution **in the next 24 hours? [Match Pence - $20](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdduutl-elutjhyju-y/) [Match Pence - $50](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdduutl-elutjhyju-t/) [Match Pence - $100](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdduutl-elutjhyju-i/) I'm running for Congress to support the Trump/Pence ticket, and I'm truly, truly disappointed in those in our party who don't. [](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdduutl-elutjhyju-d/) Vice President Pence's support has come at a critical time in this race with the runoff election just weeks away.[Are you willing to join him?](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdduutl-elutjhyju-h/) [Unsubscribe](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-u-pdduutl-elutjhyju-k/)
---

The Vice President's support means the world to me, but I want to show him that our grassroots campaign can match it.Will you help match Vice President Pence's contribution in the next 24 hours? I'm running for Congress to support the Trump/Pence ticket, and I'm truly, truly disappointed in those in our party who don't. Vice President Pence's support has come at a critical time in this race with the runoff election just weeks away.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Join Marsha Blackburn on #TeamHagerty
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-ir/) July 28, 2020 **Senator Marsha Blackburn Is #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-r/) Last week, Senator Marsha Blackburn joined President Donald Trump in endorsing Bill Hagerty for Senate. Senator Blackburn is the first female Senator from Tennessee, is a strong ally and defender of President Trump and a good friend to Bill.In her statement endorsing Bill's campaign, **Sen. Blackburn said,** "Bill is a true conservative, and he will always fight for Tennesseans. Tennesseans can't afford to send someone who is conveniently conservative to be a Republican and consistently supports President Trump when it's politically convenient. Bill is the consistently conservative choice. Join me and President Trump in supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate."You can read the press release [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-y/) **Vice President Mike Pence Is #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-j/) Last night, Vice President Mike Pence tweeted his support of Bill Hagerty, joining President Trump. Vice President Pence is a friend of #TeamHagerty and is a tremendous conservative leader. We are so proud to have yet another strong conservative leader join #TeamHagerty. You can read the press release **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-t/)** **Sean Hannity Is #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-i/) Fox News host Sean Hannity has joined President Trump, Vice President Pence, Sen. Blackburn, Sen. Tom Cotton and others in endorsing Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate. The momentum for Team Hagerty continues to build every day and we aren't taking anything for granted. You can read the press release **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-d/)** **WATCH: Hagerty With Tucker Carlson** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-h/) Bill joined Fox News with Tucker Carlson last night to discuss holding China accountable for the pandemic and how, in response, we bring our critical supply chains home to the U.S. You can watch the full clip **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-k/)** **Early Voting Is Happening Now** Early voting is underway in Tennessee for the Republican Senate Primary. #TeamHagerty is proud to have the support of Tennesseans, including over 1,000 local leaders in communities across the state. Make sure you get out to the polls and cast your ballot to send Bill to the U.S. Senate. You can find your polling location **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-u/)** **ICYMI: Bill Is DJTJ's MAGA Candidate** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-o/) Donald Trump Jr. announced Monday that Bill Hagerty is his MAGA candidate of the week! Don Jr. is a great friend to Bill and this proves, yet again, that the Trump family is all in on #TeamHagerty. In his statement, **Don Jr. said,** "Bill was a part of Team Trump before it was politically convenient. Bill understands what it takes to grow an economy and create jobs. He's done it before and he'll do it again in the Senate. I'm proud to stand with my father in support of Bill Hagerty - he's the true Trump conservative."Read the release [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-m/) **WATCH: #TeamHagerty With Sen. Tom Cotton** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-c/) Last Friday, #TeamHagerty was joined by Senator Tom Cotton of Arkansas in Williamson, Montgomery and Madison County. Sen. Cotton is a good friend to #TeamHagerty and has spoken out about his support for Bill's campaign for Senate. It was a great day on the road for #TeamHagerty and our momentum is STRONG.You can watch the video **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-q/)**** **
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-a/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-f/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-z/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[W](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-v/)**[**JHL:**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-e/) Blackburn endorses Hagerty for Senate**[Williamson Homepage:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-s/) **Sens. Tom Cotton, Marsha Blackburn and more turn out for Bill Hagerty at Franklin restaurant**[WKRN:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-g/) **Hagerty Campaign Event In Williamson County**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-w/)** U.S. Sen. Tom Cotton Tells Clarksville Residents Why He Supports Bill Hagerty**[99.7:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-yd/) **Donald Trump Jr Supports Bill Hagerty On TN Radio**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-yh/) **Tom Cotton and Bill Hagerty Discuss Taking Jobs Back from China and Defunding Schools Using The 1619 Project as Curriculum**[The Daily Times:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-yk/) **Bill Hagerty campaigns in Blount County**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-yu/) **Senator Tom Cotton and Bill Hagerty Discuss the Communist Chinese Party as Adversary to the United States of America**[Greeneville Sun:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-jl/) **Hagerty Makes Campaign Stop In Greeneville**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-jr/) **Tom Cotton Scheduled to Appear in Clarksville Alongside Bill Hagerty on Friday**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-jy/) **Marsha Blackburn Endorses Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate, Knocks Manny Sethi
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-jj/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-jt/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-ji/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-jd/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-jh/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-jk/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-tl/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-tr/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-ty/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlluiy-fuutjhhtj-tj/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_

clean_body: #TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox No images? July 28, 2020 Senator Marsha Blackburn Is #TeamHagerty Last week, Senator Marsha Blackburn joined President Donald Trump in endorsing Bill Hagerty for Senate. Senator Blackburn is the first female Senator from Tennessee, is a strong ally and defender of President Trump and a good friend to Bill.In her statement endorsing Bill's campaign, Sen. Blackburn said, "Bill is a true conservative, and he will always fight for Tennesseans. Tennesseans can't afford to send someone who is conveniently conservative to be a Republican and consistently supports President Trump when it's politically convenient. Bill is the consistently conservative choice. Join me and President Trump in supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate."You can read the press release Vice President Mike Pence Is #TeamHagerty Last night, Vice President Mike Pence tweeted his support of Bill Hagerty, joining President Trump. Vice President Pence is a friend of #TeamHagerty and is a tremendous conservative leader. We are so proud to have yet another strong conservative leader join #TeamHagerty. You can read the press release Sean Hannity Is #TeamHagerty Fox News host Sean Hannity has joined President Trump, Vice President Pence, Sen. Blackburn, Sen. Tom Cotton and others in endorsing Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate. The momentum for Team Hagerty continues to build every day and we aren't taking anything for granted. You can read the press release WATCH: Hagerty With Tucker Carlson Bill joined Fox News with Tucker Carlson last night to discuss holding China accountable for the pandemic and how, in response, we bring our critical supply chains home to the U.S. You can watch the full clip Early Voting Is Happening Now Early voting is underway in Tennessee for the Republican Senate Primary. #TeamHagerty is proud to have the support of Tennesseans, including over 1,000 local leaders in communities across the state. Make sure you get out to the polls and cast your ballot to send Bill to the U.S. Senate. You can find your polling location ICYMI: Bill Is DJTJ's MAGA Candidate Donald Trump Jr. announced Monday that Bill Hagerty is his MAGA candidate of the week! Don Jr. is a great friend to Bill and this proves, yet again, that the Trump family is all in on #TeamHagerty. In his statement, Don Jr. said, "Bill was a part of Team Trump before it was politically convenient. Bill understands what it takes to grow an economy and create jobs. He's done it before and he'll do it again in the Senate. I'm proud to stand with my father in support of Bill Hagerty - he's the true Trump conservative."Read the release WATCH: #TeamHagerty With Sen. Tom Cotton Last Friday, #TeamHagerty was joined by Senator Tom Cotton of Arkansas in Williamson, Montgomery and Madison County. Sen. Cotton is a good friend to #TeamHagerty and has spoken out about his support for Bill's campaign for Senate. It was a great day on the road for #TeamHagerty and our momentum is STRONG.You can watch the video Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty Press Highlights Blackburn endorses Hagerty for Senate Sens. Tom Cotton, Marsha Blackburn and more turn out for Bill Hagerty at Franklin restaurant Hagerty Campaign Event In Williamson County U.S. Sen. Tom Cotton Tells Clarksville Residents Why He Supports Bill Hagerty Donald Trump Jr Supports Bill Hagerty On TN Radio Tom Cotton and Bill Hagerty Discuss Taking Jobs Back from China and Defunding Schools Using The 1619 Project as Curriculum Bill Hagerty campaigns in Blount County Senator Tom Cotton and Bill Hagerty Discuss the Communist Chinese Party as Adversary to the United States of America Hagerty Makes Campaign Stop In Greeneville Tom Cotton Scheduled to Appear in Clarksville Alongside Bill Hagerty on Friday Marsha Blackburn Endorses Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate, Knocks Manny Sethi What They're Saying... "Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!" " Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families." " Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man." " Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative." " Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground." " Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!" " We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud." " We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty." " I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty." " Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County." " You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_ | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty P.O. Box 150748 Nashville, TN 37215 |

name: Dr. James St. George
subject: Weekly Campaign Update
body:
Dear Friends and Supporters,**21 more days until the election!**It has been another successful week on the campaign trail. We are pleased to announce that Florida Right to Life Political Action Committee has given us an 100% A rating on our stance on Pro Life issues. I am pro-life, plain and simple. In Congress I will do everything in my power to support ideals and policies protecting life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for all people, including those who have yet to be born!We also want to thank the Trump Club of Marion County for inviting us to their candidate forum to discuss the pressing issues that need to be addressed in Congress. Through the lens of a doctor and a businessman, my priorities are to fight socialism, revitalize our economy, and fix healthcare. President Trump has done a great job already with reducing more regulations than any other president and I stand by him and his decisions. Together we can Make America Great Again. **_Back by Popular Demand! Trump Signs_** You asked...so we delivered. We have restocked our Trump and Dr. James St. George signs! Please reach out to our team if you would like a sign to show your support. [CONTACT OUR TEAM](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-r/) _**Volunteer Team**_

It is 100 degrees outside, but Team St. George is already on FIRE! Our canvass and calling team have grown tremendously! Our team has been working non-stop throughout District 3, reaching out to voters and raising awareness on why it is critical to have doctors in office right now. Join the winning team and help us stop lawyers, career politicians and radical leftist from making healthcare decisions, by becoming a volunteer today [BECOME A VOLUNTEER TODAY](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-y/) [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-j/) _**Meet & Greet**_Next Monday, August 3rd, we are having a meet and greet at our campaign headquarters! Our address is 220 Palmer Street Green Cove Springs FL 32043. Come by to meet Dr. James St. George in person to discuss which issues are important to you and learn why he is the most qualified in this race! Please [**RSVP HERE**](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-t/) or by emailing [info@votestgeorge.com](mailto:info@votestgeorge.com).We want to thank all of you for being a supporter of Dr. James St. George. Please be safe and do not hesitate to reach out to our campaign team with any questions or issues you wish to see addressed. We will continue to work tirelessly to tackle prominent issues in our community. And as always, we put people over politics. **It would be an honor to have you vote Dr. James St. George on August 18th!** Warmest Regards,James [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-i/) | [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-d/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-h/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-u/)
---|---|---
Physician, Businessman, Community Leader, Eagle Scout, Husband, Father, Christian, NRA-rated Marksman, Conservative, Republican... These are just a few of the words to describe Dr. James St. George. For more than a decade, James has served patients at his clinics throughout north Florida and played an active role in the medical community, helping to improve healthcare services throughout our area.
[Unsubscribe](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jkduldyd-ojijtnthh-o/)

subject: ICYMI! I Need Your Opinion!
body:

Dear Peter,
I hope you are staying safe and well during this time! I have a favor to ask! With all of the conversation and excitement over the presidential election, I was hoping you could answer a few questions for me! I really want to understand the general feeling out there and have created a brief survey. The survey should only take a few minutes.

Would you mind filling this out? [https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/3M2QJN2](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/30.136736.aspx)

I look forward to seeing you all again soon!

**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_

clean_body: Help Us Hit Our Goal... | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. = Dear Friend, Friday at midnight we close out our first month of fundraising since Rick was elected as the nominee - and we need your help to raise an additional $6,475 to hit our target. = | = The choice for Central Texans couldn't be more clear - a long-time Washington insider who has pledged loyalty to his donors, his party, and the president, or a long-time Central Texan who has pledged his loyalty to the country, the Constitution, and most importantly, the people of Central Texas. Rick will be a clear, independent, centrist voice for all of us, and we've already seen that once people hear our message, they're on board. Friend,

As Margaret’s campaign manager, it’s my job to make sure every single part of our campaign is running smoothly, and to do that I need to make sure we have the resources we need from month to month. That’s why we have these monthly fundraising deadlines, so we can stay on track to raise the resources we need to continue building out the campaign and ensure we have the resources to take on Vern Buchanan and win.

**The bottom line is that in order to defeat Vern, we’re going to need money, and lots of it.**

Vern has already taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate PACs and there’s no telling how much money he’s going to loan his campaign from his personal fortune.

**We can’t let Vern and his corporate donors buy this election. So it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to help us reach our online fundraising goals month after month if we want to win this race and defeat Vern.**

**[We’re only $7,150 away from reaching the ambitious $20,000 online fundraising goal we’ve set for the month, and you can help us reach it by making a contribution before Friday’s deadline. Margaret is counting on you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18449349/229021339/1073285021?refcode2=5645b389-9dd1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emci=5545b389-9dd1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=5645b389-9dd1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&refcode=072920-es-eom-5-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjQ1YjM4OS05ZGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rGNhSjstXaU-j9W4jbv5Dg6pQxKr3N5tSC_5CxZypE=)**

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: Tony Gonzales
subject: RELEASE: With Canvass Complete in All 29 Counties, Gonzales Wins CD-23 Republican Primary Runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress**
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://tonygonzales.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdulhld-olulttitiy-i/)
| | | _**For Immediate Release: **_
July 28, 2020 **Media Contact:**
Matt Mackowiak
[Matt@PotomacStrategyGroup.com](mailto:Matt@PotomacStrategyGroup.com) **_With Canvass Complete in All 29 Counties, Gonzales Wins CD-23 Republican Primary Runoff_**
_Forty Six Vote Final Margin Confirmed, General Election Begins Now_ **SAN ANTONIO, TX** — The Tony Gonzales for Congress campaign announced today that the final canvass has been completed by all 29 counties in congressional district 23 and it confirmed that Tony Gonzales won the Republican primary runoff. The final margin is 46 votes (12,342 – 12,296) out of 24,638 cast. “This was a razor thin victory margin, but we are grateful to win the Republican Primary Runoff,” said Tony Gonzales. “We have just 79 days until early voting starts in the general election, so there is no time to waste. With liberal Gina Jones sitting on over $2 million from out-of-state donors, we must immediately unify the party to win this race in November. I want to congratulate Raul Reyes on running a tough and vigorous campaign. As difficult as it is, I hope he will put the party first so we can begin working to defeat Gina Jones and Nancy Pelosi here in south and southwest Texas. There is too much at stake.” Learn more about Tony Gonzales and his campaign by visiting [TonyGonzalesForCongress.com](https://tonygonzales.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdulhld-olulttitiy-d/).
---

Under one party rule, elected officials like Bill de Blasio and Max Rose not only refuse to speak out against the violent anarchy occurring in our city... they encouraged it by supporting the closure of Rikers Island, the disastrous bail reform, releasing dangerous prisoners back onto our streets and defunding our police.

It’s outrageous and it’s wrong.

I was born and raised in this city. I remember what it was like in the 1980’s. It was scary. It was dangerous. I don’t want to go backwards. And that’s where the progressives’ regressive agenda is taking us.

name: Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: Corruption is ruining our democracy, but it doesn't have to be this way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
And Jon's opponent is the poster boy of Washington corruption. |
---
Friend -- **Corruption is destroying our democracy.**

_Republicans in Congress repeatedly vote to gut protections for pre-existing conditions because they're bought by the insurance industry._

_The Trump Administration silences its own environmental scientists because science threatens the GOP's patrons in the fossil fuel industry._

**It doesn't have to be this way, friend.**

**This November, we have the opportunity to remove corrupt elected officials like Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and David Perdue from power -- and elect anti-corruption reformers like Jon Ossoff to clean up their mess.**

**[Right now, can you make a contribution to Jon Ossoff's campaign to end corruption's reign in Washington before our crucial end-of-July fundraising deadline?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e211e/5b2c1286/3ded3225/25f101ef/4148883113/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_29_corruption_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_29_corruption_eom")**
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e211e/5b2c1286/3ded3225/25f101ef/4148883113/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_29_corruption_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_29_corruption_eom") | | [Chip in NOW to remove these corrupt politicians from power](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e211e/5b2c1286/3ded3225/25f101ef/4148883113/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_29_corruption_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_29_corruption_eom")
---
Jon has spent his career fighting corruption. He runs a business that investigates bribery and the abuse of power worldwide, and his campaign has refused corporate PAC contributions.

**Meanwhile, Jon's opponent, David Perdue, is the poster boy of Washington corruption:**
> * He sold meetings for corporate campaign cash and took illegal corporate campaign contributions.
> * He bought medical stock while publicly downplaying the coronavirus pandemic.
> * He took contributions from Big Pharma, then voted against importing cheaper prescription drugs from Canada.
**David Perdue answers only to the Trump family and the cartel of corporate lobbyists who have purchased his allegiance.**

It's time we send David Perdue home.

**Jon Ossoff will root out the corruption that's kept people like Perdue and Mitch McConnell in power.**

**[Jon is leading Perdue in the polls, but we need to make a big push this week to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. Right now, can you make a stand against corruption and chip in $10 to defeat Perdue?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e211e/5b2c1286/3ded3225/25f101ee/4148883113/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_29_corruption_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_29_corruption_eom&amount=10")**

body:
Fight Back Against the Cancel Culture | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/judsonsapp.com/im-running-for-congress-847810?e=dc147d445f)

---
| | Friends,

The liberal "cancel culture" has struck again and tried their best to bring down the largest Latino-owned food company in America: Goya.

They are doing this because the CEO supports President Trump.

[](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=370d459ba9&e=dc147d445f)Goya and the family behind the company is an American success story. The very same success the Left hates.

**Conservatives like us are under attack like never before.

I won't let them silence us. I've spoken out on Gator Bait, Blue Lives Matter, Goya, and I've stood by Our President.**

We must stand up to the liberals and not allow ourselves to be bullied.

**As a candidate for Congress, I am standing firm on principle and will not be intimidated into backing down.**

**I still believe America is the greatest nation to ever exist.** It is so because of our freedom - and because of people like us!

I will not allow a vocal group of extremists to ruin this country.

**The primary election is on August 18th - less than 3 weeks away!**

We must get our message out to more voters, and we need your help to do it!

I humbly ask for your support to help me reach more people like us so we can send a true conservative to Congress who won't back down to the Left.

**[Would you consider making a donation today of $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500?](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=118b897a08&e=dc147d445f)**

With your contribution of $100 we can send out 300 mail pieces.

With your contribution of $250 we can run our television commercial 5 more times.

**[Donate today](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=e6c42bd439&e=dc147d445f) to send the Left a clear message. [Stand with me.](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=30cd43d78d&e=dc147d445f)**

Thank you for your friendship and your support,

_**Judson**_

name: 2020 Vote-by-Mail Alert
subject: Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams (re: vote-by-mail)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The soul of our democracy is at stake.
| | |
---
Friend, the soul of our democracy is at stake - and we need to make sure every single voice is heard at the ballot box this November.
But Republicans are launching an all-out assault on voting rights across the country, attacking vote-by-mail and forcing Americans to choose between their health and their rights. **That's why Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are calling on YOU to help defend our right to vote before it's too late: **
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vote-by-mail-match?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk405-su-nd")
This isn't just hypothetical, friend: With all the dirty voter-suppression tricks played in 2018, Stacey Abrams fell just _55,000_ votes short of winning her governor's race. We can't let history repeat itself - Democrats across the country have to speak out NOW.
**We need to hear from just 34 more Democrats in Georgia by midnight, but we're still missing your response. With the most important election of our lifetimes before us, please make your voice heard right now:**
| | **Will you stand with Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama to demand universal vote-by-mail?**

name: Mark Warner for VA
subject: our voter registration efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Right now, the GOP is outpacing Democrats in new voter registrations.
|
---

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db87/53d9897e/5463877e/1c885af9/1839319257/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juleom?refcode=20200729_f_1_nd__678__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Derek --

**Right now, the GOP is outpacing Democrats in new voter registrations.**

We know that the last thing anyone wants right now is bad news, but we're less than 100 days out from Election Day 2020, and we can't afford to let this trend continue.

This bad news comes on the heels of other frustrating developments:
* Donald Trump is leading Joe Biden in campaign donations from Virginia; and
* Mark Warner's opponent has already raised **_over $1 million_** in his campaign to flip Virginia red.

**All this means if Mark is going to pull out a victory in November we 've got to _seriously_ ramp up our own fundraising. [Will you pitch in before our end-of-month deadline on Friday to help us register more voters, re-elect Mark, and keep Virginia blue?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db87/53d9897e/5463877e/1c885af8/1839319257/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juleom?refcode=20200729_f_1_nd__678__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Derek, we already know this election is going to look different -- we're still in the middle of a global pandemic. Thankfully, Virginians have the option to vote with a no-excuse absentee ballot, vote early in-person, or cast their ballot on Election Day. But expanded ballot access isn't going to do any good if we don't register folks to vote.

Now, more than ever, it matters who we put in charge of our country. We must elect leaders who will navigate the Covid-19 crisis responsibly, who will expand access to affordable health care, and who will help pull us through this economic crisis. The first step is getting as many folks as we can across the Commonwealth registered to vote.

**[Will you help us do it by chipping in by Friday's end-of-month deadline so we can make sure that everyone is able to make their voice heard this November?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db87/53d9897e/5463877e/1c885ae7/1839319257/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juleom?refcode=20200729_f_1_nd__678__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support!

Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db87/53d9897e/5463877e/1c885ae6/1839319257/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juleom?refcode=20200729_f_1_nd__678__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

We know that the last thing anyone wants right now is bad news, but we're less than 100 days out from Election Day 2020, and we can't afford to let this trend continue. This bad news comes on the heels of other frustrating developments: Donald Trump is leading Joe Biden in campaign donations from Virginia; and Mark Warner's opponent has already raised over $1 million in his campaign to flip Virginia red. All this means if Mark is going to pull out a victory in November we 've got to seriously ramp up our own fundraising. [**TJ Cox is the most vulnerable Democrat in Congress, and he can’t win his tough re-election battle without us. name: Kat Cammack
subject: A nation without borders is not a sovereign nation
body:
I'll stand with Trump, build the wall, support our law enforcement, and enforce our immigration laws
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Patriot,
For many decades, immigration policy has been kicked down the road and the rule of law ignored. It's well beyond the time we address this issue with common-sense solutions that protect our citizens and national sovereignty.
I pledge to work with President Trump to help build the wall and secure the border. I will never support amnesty of any kind for those who illegally enter our country and will prioritize this issue on day one in office.
The failure to stop unauthorized crossings over the past several decades have led to serious national security threats and an influx of individuals who have illegally entered our country. Drugs, weapons, and human trafficking have become major national problems in large part due to our porous borders.
[Click HERE to learn more about my position on this issue](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j8evqJzxt5qVvsBfvH3YKmt9Qgcxoj8_5RtVvREkbQnnp8OTdYKCl2wGu46aQRwHuVpa667Gsa65u5hPX0-W-EVcxKCDO8yDnxiDqrIlpJjdAgX3JXMPfcAGssh09741M52VrZJdY14YXo8_rh1omA==&c=e6rkalJMfM6wnRoG7UymnjTcHKnaogWDVQUuWhkoN_4MZmjeDU0g3Q==&ch=yj0erf3bE1zubvBYJ9xo8wE7nZo_rlST3rfPgUJCQuCxYsrPWL6_yA==)

| During my time on the Human Trafficking Task Force in Congressman Ted Yoho's office, I saw first-hand one of the most vile and inhumane consequences of continuing to allow the tide of illegal immigrants to flood this Nation. If elected, I will be a voice on Capitol Hill to fight for a physical barrier, new technologies, and increased personnel to accomplish the goal of keeping our country safe and stemming the flow of illegal immigration.
You can be assured that as your next representative, I will proudly join President Trump is his efforts to reform immigration and build the wall.
[I you agree with me on this important issue, please consider clicking here and contributing to our campaign today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j8evqJzxt5qVvsBfvH3YKmt9Qgcxoj8_5RtVvREkbQnnp8OTdYKClz8EaKhScGERZrrjx2HCivLvbaEMFtkBtChUkWoVRq_S6RGLtKaiZnzGP-yVNLC0RhYuFI2gx4N_ucKUb_nTbGENfxeE8zJVtgsuUAZABwvXsZt1XnPNQYs=&c=e6rkalJMfM6wnRoG7UymnjTcHKnaogWDVQUuWhkoN_4MZmjeDU0g3Q==&ch=yj0erf3bE1zubvBYJ9xo8wE7nZo_rlST3rfPgUJCQuCxYsrPWL6_yA==)

name: Team Joe
subject: It's not too late to turn this around -- but Trump's not up to the task
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We need real leadership in the White House to address this health crisis. We need Joe Biden. |
---
[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b985/1cd0ac28/1778786a0/357d0896/2288862730/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020-headercountdown?refcode=julyheadercountdowntest&amount=25")
Peter --

**It took just 15 days earlier this month for another _one million_ Americans to test positive with COVID-19.** Over 150,000 have died, many of them alone as their families stayed socially distant.

President Trump's response to this gut-wrenching horror?

He tweeted. He played golf. And he continued doing _nothing_ to seriously confront the greatest public health crisis of our lifetimes. **Donald Trump has abandoned America to suffer the consequences of his failure to confront coronavirus. It 's an outrage.**

**We need real leadership in the White House to address this health crisis. We need Joe Biden.**

[**Please, chip in your first $5 to our campaign to end Donald Trump 's failed presidency. **While Trump was ignoring public health experts and making the crisis worse, Joe Biden was leading by example -- just like he always has.**

For months, Joe has been sharing his plan to get coronavirus under control: Surge testing. Get protective equipment to our heroic frontline workers. Listen to experts like Dr. Fauci, instead of denigrating them in the press. Do what it takes to save lives.

Joe knows that the victims of COVID-19 aren't just numbers on a chart. They are jobs lost, dreams deferred, loved ones mourned, and lives shattered. It doesn't have to be this way, Peter. We can't allow Trump's failure to go on.

clean_body: We need real leadership in the White House to address this health crisis. We need Joe Biden. | "" Peter -- It took just 15 days earlier this month for another one million Americans to test positive with COVID-19. Over 150,000 have died, many of them alone as their families stayed socially distant. President Trump's response to this gut-wrenching horror? He tweeted. He played golf. And he continued doing nothing to seriously confront the greatest public health crisis of our lifetimes. Donald Trump has abandoned America to suffer the consequences of his failure to confront coronavirus. It 's an outrage. We need real leadership in the White House to address this health crisis. name: Kate C., Communications Director
subject: Christina Finello is Afraid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
There are less than 100 days until the election, and Christina Finello is afraid. Afraid to debate, afraid to explain her extremist policies, and most [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=a6b265c849ce4385a627b7f71082aa24&_e=MCB2wT1aLSmxF9GKSXt2HtoetZZEg4DUNsFaFCp6MczeYlX-xSpaJCkZJOH54ZUHnA1WgAbgONDG58yFaohLC5B8uNK4c2swCYbbUze4zNcNrlfvkNVywC0MLQ57CsTpnwrH5qDusRFwpUhOUrG2-tvkNFOkjoUhl4chCmTrTrj4ud7QT9kySdcK2gUW-kHH7DDuok2yeotdoLk3ESP9XsGq_6HgtYhjMhf2is-O_auhUASIkKis5wGFOMvPgyTXsq1eBHQ9ttD5vBvSboenfWkBXXwPki7DQRk_qcd39yoTIl4G-g0SDpcSlZDM-oG1) Friend, There are less than 100 days until the election, and Christina Finello is afraid. Afraid to debate, afraid to explain her extremist policies, and most of all afraid to face the voters of Pennsylvania! Finello doesn’t want you to know that she has called Nancy Pelosi a “role model.” That she “proudly” accepts the endorsement of socialist Elizabeth Warren. That she supports defunding the police and allowing dangerous criminals to be released from prison. [**STOP FINELLO NOW**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=a6b265c849ce4385a627b7f71082aa24&_e=MCB2wT1aLSmxF9GKSXt2HtoetZZEg4DUNsFaFCp6MczeYlX-xSpaJCkZJOH54ZUHnA1WgAbgONDG58yFaohLC5B8uNK4c2swCYbbUze4zNcV2Y91HDQJPJ38VHF0LsASql2ko3oAwvYcPeycpP7zluPBWdf7uYY5nOK10SPmrWTrfXST0LLAz3q7mD_JMl4hnZQUk2G--JvNR2Sf8mzcrQfQ7fpHGsVxqja76oDE8jrImGT5NVuKJvtnUpIaQl6YSQqWuKmeTaGeQq0dwYGQIkaKhbY_ruXWlN8bNM1eXj2ggj7sMQVyracd5jj_Dfmx) There’s another fundraising deadline approaching...I know our campaign asks you for money a lot, but it’s only because this election is so important to the future of Pennsylvania’s First Congressional District. And Finello’s extremist record is **PROOF** that if we don’t re-elect Brian this November, we’ll be left with someone beholden to the far-left’s partisan agenda. Our campaign End of Month deadline is this Friday at midnight, and we can’t afford to be outraised. **[Will you donate today to make sure we meet our fundraising goals and re-elect a strong voice for the state of Pennsylvania?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=a6b265c849ce4385a627b7f71082aa24&_e=MCB2wT1aLSmxF9GKSXt2HtoetZZEg4DUNsFaFCp6MczeYlX-xSpaJCkZJOH54ZUHnA1WgAbgONDG58yFaohLC5B8uNK4c2swCYbbUze4zNchqsuNBIo54PHN6spEaNuGpPQbGvAwO3Oh78NkLhbQD9AN8U_X1ecLwXGfPD1ZK2-dGzm-CEq0tjmnO6P0T8XZH7ovdYtmixnuRjo4RsUUDN9HABhONkd9YxO3m9rtm243di_iIfSSebFB2mnYYqmFVT5G3Ez1iZqsxe8DLxSAKX4WZNwYdKp9sEv4Eyb-BrcjCh1FONRj78F0aSqqfJRv)** [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=a6b265c849ce4385a627b7f71082aa24&_e=MCB2wT1aLSmxF9GKSXt2HtoetZZEg4DUNsFaFCp6MczeYlX-xSpaJCkZJOH54ZUHnA1WgAbgONDG58yFaohLC5B8uNK4c2swCYbbUze4zNf2aFNsB7N3tBDrpJ8FWYv8c-i8tUgFAtsQvq0BHunku_JGgy7zjdcRYzTHGDCC2h0K8uQEglVoWbKLPXLgOmLNOaCwDP5cCQ3BeAy44fu1UcwV5Y2QTTOWgpRFXDlmP23SFpVGNNdPvCxyT3wGLqviFPUl0-G7jlyGR5_aBKo2KSBeHUcI3GHNHFk-l41CJ9nxcIvgCa6y9bfAIw22XuQS) Thanks, Kate C. clean_body: = We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Team, With less than 100 days until the election, our race is heating up by the day. In just the last few weeks, a dark money group backed by big drug companies started airing over $200,000 in TV ads to prop up Scott Perry. In addition, two dark money groups are running massive digital ad campaigns to reach as many voters as possible. To put it simply: Washington special interests are attacking our grassroots campaign from all sides, and we need your support to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Team, these special interest groups are rushing to stop Eugene from getting to Washington because they’re worried about having a real leader hold them accountable. | Derek, We have some new products on our [NHGOP Store](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDc2MDQyODE3Njc4NjExNDczJmM9dDZkNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzg0NDQwNzMmZD10Mnc2dTNi.E5gezrvaQeMoLROHplCDjj46TDQbB1MpyM1YHc67Dq8) that you won't want to miss out on! Next month, President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence will be re-nominated at the 2020 RNC Convention. We want to make sure you are well equipped to watch the Convention throughout New Hampshire in style! To commemorate the 2020 Convention we've placed new products to our NHGOP Store with our **OFFICIAL 2020 New Hampshire RNC Logo!**

subject: Trump's coming to Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
That's because he's scared we're going to win.

| | Peter: Donald Trump is in Texas today.

This is **his third trip** to Texas in 2020 -- he's neck-and-neck with Joe Biden in the polls, and Sen. Cornyn's abysmal performance in office isn't helping. Cornyn's approval rating is underwater -- ten points lower than Ted Cruz's! All the polling shows Texas is in play, and _they are terrified._ **[HELP US FLIP TEXAS](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eac/7f51f7bc/400813c7/4ef7ba18/3114509170/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200729.1nd__1824__&amount=10")** Sen. Cornyn has an 18-year record of standing with his DC bosses and special interest donors instead of doing what's right for Texans. **So in honor of Trump 's third trip to the Lone Star State, here are three times Sen. Cornyn stood with him over Texans:**
1. Sen. Cornyn has consistently downplayed the administration's disastrous handling of COVID-19. He used racist rhetoric scapegoating Chinese culture, tweeted jokes about Corona beer, and spread misinformation that children can't die from COVID-19.
2. He supported the administration's plan to steal land from Texans and funds from our military to pay for the border wall.
3. And as health care repeal's "top salesman," Sen. Cornyn worked his tail off to gut the Affordable Care Act, including protections for preexisting conditions. After voting against the ACA _20 times_ , he recently admitted that the ACA was "good news" for millions of Americans losing their jobs because of COVID-19.

Sen. Cornyn has never had a backbone, and he doesn't put Texans first. **[Will you donate in"honor" of Trump's visit to help MJ kick Sen. Cornyn to the curb this November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eac/7f51f7bc/400813c7/4ef7ba18/3114509170/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200729.1nd__1824__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

URGENT DEADLINE: CALLING ON YOU

Friend,

subject: Why Indiana’s 5th matters in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
I need your help to win BIG in Indiana’s 5th district! Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469586?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

We have a lot riding on the 2020 elections.

The Democrats have truly gone too far this time, and the only way to stop them is to take back the House. That’s why it’s crucial that we win this battleground race in Indiana’s 5th Congressional District.

Chairman Hupfer is building a special donor list for supporters who are helping us win this district. Will you chip in now and add your name?

Donate $5 to WIN Indiana’s 5th! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=5&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $10 to WIN Indiana’s 5th! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=10&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $25 to WIN Indiana’s 5th! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=25&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $50 to WIN Indiana’s 5th! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=50&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $100 to WIN Indiana’s 5th! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=100&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $250 to WIN Indiana’s 5th! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=250&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate what you can to WIN Indiana’s 5th! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We simply can’t afford another term with Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker’s Office. The Democrats know that Hoosiers are tired of politics as usual and the coastal elites trying to drag us towards socialism.

https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

They’re going to do everything in their power to prop up my radical opponent, but we can fight back.

Donate NOW to fight back! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=&mc_cid=329d6c4f69&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Every dollar donated helps us reach Republican voters in my district and get them to the polls. I’m working my tail off on the campaign trail, but I can’t do it alone. I need your help.

Are you in?

Thanks,
Victoria Spartz

subject: Keeping CA-48 Blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Yesterday, my team emailed you about an incredibly competitive race that's shaping up in CA-48. Democrat Harley Rouda is running for re-election against an opponent who has ignored COVID-19 research, made derogatory jokes about the LGBTQ community and is an avid supporter of President Trump.

I know Congressman Rouda and I've seen how much he cares about the people of Orange County. He's the first Democrat to ever represent CA-48. We cannot risk losing him to a Republican opponent who will sideline our progressive agenda and set our country back decades.

POLITICO has ranked Congressman Rouda's race a "toss-up" heading into November's election. Together, we can make sure Harley has the people's support on his side. Will you help keep Harley Rouda in Congress by making a donation to his re-election campaign today?

All contributions made using this form will be split evenly between Harley Rouda for Congress and Linda Sánchez for Congress.

Many thanks,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/iyA5k7TQ4k5xgsCzmJPTw8OwoeB-hsjKHjGuQMRIzYY=/nrY9k40Ocfeq0uj4Wg_4UdNbxMk7QvzWHG2dTTFHcoM=.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Bringing Drug Manufacture Back to America—Another Trump Triumph
body:
The Kodak project is a big win for the Defense Production Act, the nation, and a huge step forward toward US pharmaceutical independence. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7760c37389&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **_Bringing Drug Manufacture Back to America—Another Trump Triumph_**

This week, the Trump Administration signed off on a partnership with Kodak to begin producing critical pharmaceutical ingredients right here in the United States.

“America is dangerously dependent on foreign supply chains for all three stages of drug production: starting materials used to manufacture active ingredients, the active ingredients themselves and the finished product in the form of tablets, pills and injectables,” Peter Navarro and Adam Boehler write.

“The Kodak project is a big win for the Defense Production Act, a big win for New York and the nation—and a huge step forward toward US pharmaceutical independence.”

[**Click here to read more.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=430f8c3bb0&e=3ee4985eea "https://nypost.com/2020/07/28/bringing-drug-manufacture-back-to-america-and-new-york-another-trump-triumph/")
---
|
---
| California Gov. Gavin Newsom has declared that over 80 percent of the state’s school-age population won’t return to the classroom this fall—despite calls from the CDC, the American Academy of Pediatrics, and other healthcare experts for schools to reopen for in-person learning wherever possible, retired teacher Larry Sand writes in _[City Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d97e1007b8&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.city-journal.org/california-cancels-school")_ _._
|
---
| “President Trump will head to Midland, Texas on Wednesday to tour an oil rig owned by Double Eagle Energy and deliver remarks on how the U.S. is achieving energy dominance by cutting regulations, simplifying permitting, and encouraging private investment in energy infrastructure,” Lucas Manfredi writes for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b9bcab070&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “On a nightly basis, hordes of rioters attack federal law enforcement officers who are guarding Portland’s Mark O. Hatfield Federal Courthouse . . . On Monday night, one of [the rioters] threw a bomb at the courthouse,” Victor Joecks writes. “The rampant violence isn’t a small part of the story. It is the story—just not one the mainstream media want to talk about.” Read more in the [_Las Vegas Review-Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c437ea84d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe3ca3633a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=435cfb77ce&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fa089454e7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace?=
subject: Fwd: did you see this
body:
My fundraising team sent you an email earlier this week — did you see it? We set an ambitious end of month goal for July (100 unique donors), and I... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/42896b4f7371/how-we-flip-the-house-2088242?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9d78d884cc&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Friends,

My fundraising team sent you an email earlier this week — did you see it?
We set an ambitious end of month goal for July (100 unique donors), and I wanted to make sure you got a chance to become more involved in our campaign.

We’re closing in on our opponent, and Election Day is coming up fast. Every single day matters and every single donation matters.

Can I count on you to come through for me? Chip in any amount below to help us reach our goal of 100 donors.

**[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2088242/july-deadline/100 donors/](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=6ae1b7fdb4&e=f1831b4ca2)**

Thanks,

Nancy Mace

**— — — Forwarded message — — —**
From: Mace Fundraising Team
Subject: less than 100 days left
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a49ebfba5d&e=f1831b4ca2)**
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9e1b309e38&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friends,

We can’t believe it, but there are less than 100 days left until Election Day 2020.
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=efb6800fcc&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| That means we’re going to be engaged in an all-out sprint from here on out. Our team is fired up (especially Nancy!), ready to go, and hellbent on sending our opponent packing on November 3.

_But we can’t do it alone. We’re going to need your support every single step of the way if we’re going to win on Election Day. _

That’s why we set a goal of 100 individual donors (to commemorate crossing the 100-day threshold) before midnight on July 31.
---
| [Rush a donation to Nancy’s campaign](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=42accbe9e8&e=f1831b4ca2 "Rush a donation to Nancy’s campaign")
---
| Our race is one of the most competitive fights in the entire country. We’re gaining on our opponent and one of the latest polls showed us within one point of taking the lead!

It’s clear that our momentum is surging — that’s why Vice President Pence stopped by the Lowcountry last week to show his support for Nancy. He knows that this race is up for grabs, and he’s doing everything he can to help push us over the top. **_“Nancy Mace is an incredible American with an incredible American story, and she’ll be a leader from day one”_ \- Vice President Mike Pence **
But here’s the catch: our opponent is outspending us with help from liberal special interest groups and his friends in Washington.

**We need to match him step for step, and that starts with hitting monthly deadlines like this one. **

[**Will you become one of 100 donors who help us reach our end of month goal? Donate using the button below.**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b4507bf6e7&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [Rush a donation to Nancy’s campaign](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3fe9bf9136&e=f1831b4ca2 "Rush a donation to Nancy’s campaign")
---
| Thank you,

Mace Fundraising Team

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: Iowa ag leaders rally behind Miller-Meeks
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

We are thrilled to announce our 114 member agriculture coalition led by Iowa Secretary of Agriculture, Mike Naig!

Our coalition not only features representation from the most respected and admired agriculture leaders in southeast Iowa, it also has representation from each of the 24 counties in the Iowa 2nd district.

Our agriculture industry in southeast Iowa has been given inadequate representation in Congress for far too long. In Congress I will fight every day for policies that build up Iowa agriculture instead of shutting it down. Iowa farmers need a champion in Congress; not a bureaucrat lecturing them.

There's still room to join our agriculture coalition if you haven't yet by clicking [here](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=7e198e727a&e=16fac31a0f). And if you are a republican who supports pro-agriculture policies you can contribute to our campaign by clicking [here](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=70b2ea3ea5&e=16fac31a0f)!

Thank you all for your support!

Sincerely,

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

---
|
---
| | | [Join our Coalition](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=2617045468&e=16fac31a0f "Join our Coalition")
---

Miller-Meeks For Congress

Ottumwa, IA 52501

name: Allen Chen
subject: Sri’s opponent with Trump in Texas today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Troy Nehls was on hand to roll out the red carpet.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18460500/229209379/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.29_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjAzNTNkYS1kZWQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvpblsHzZLSYkjIvtGTIXGQlOeELdYxU0EMnYQMKgcE=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18460501/229209380/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjAzNTNkYS1kZWQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvpblsHzZLSYkjIvtGTIXGQlOeELdYxU0EMnYQMKgcE=&emci=83ae14d1-d9d1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=160353da-ded1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

Friend,

**Donald Trump is in Texas today, and none other than Troy Nehls was on hand to roll out the red carpet.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18460502/229209381/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.29_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjAzNTNkYS1kZWQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvpblsHzZLSYkjIvtGTIXGQlOeELdYxU0EMnYQMKgcE=)
_**(Troy Nehls excitedly greets Trump in Texas)**_
| [Flip TX-22 ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18460503/229209382/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.29_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjAzNTNkYS1kZWQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvpblsHzZLSYkjIvtGTIXGQlOeELdYxU0EMnYQMKgcE=)
---

Trump’s caravan of staff largely went without masks as they arrived in Texas -- _despite_ the July spike in COVID-19 cases and statewide mask mandate.

Friend, we know the Trump administration doesn’t take the threat of COVID-19 seriously. It’s represented in their rhetoric and actions of downplaying mask use and denigrating our healthcare officials. It’s represented in their policy positions around schools reopening and their choice to defund the World Health Organizations.

**And it’s reflected by the record number of cases we set every day -- especially here in Texas.**

At a time like this, we don’t need the kind of “leadership” Troy Nehls offers by pretending this pandemic doesn’t exist so he can get closer to Washington power. Because his actions today are reflective of exactly what he’ll offer us if he wins this race.

[**We deserve better, friend. That’s why we’re fighting to send Sri to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18460504/229209383/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.29_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjAzNTNkYS1kZWQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvpblsHzZLSYkjIvtGTIXGQlOeELdYxU0EMnYQMKgcE=)
[Demand better: Send Sri to Congress ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18460505/229209384/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.29_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjAzNTNkYS1kZWQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvpblsHzZLSYkjIvtGTIXGQlOeELdYxU0EMnYQMKgcE=)
---

While Troy Nehls downplayed the virus as his own employees got sick, Sri built a grassroots network in our community that shared resources and uplifted each other during this time.

Our campaign is committed to ensuring that our common-sense policies, like increasing access to affordable health care and building an economy that works for everyone, are championed in Washington for the families who need this relief most.

[**That’s what a real leader does, friend. And that’s what we’re fighting for. Stand up to Troy Nehls and stand up for our families by uplifting Sri’s campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18460506/229209385/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.29_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjAzNTNkYS1kZWQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvpblsHzZLSYkjIvtGTIXGQlOeELdYxU0EMnYQMKgcE=)

As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Friend, we know the Trump administration doesn’t take the threat of COVID-19 seriously. It’s represented in their rhetoric and actions of downplaying mask use and denigrating our healthcare officials. It’s represented in their policy positions around schools reopening and their choice to defund the World Health Organizations. And it’s reflected by the record number of cases we set every day -- especially here in Texas. At a time like this, we don’t need the kind of “leadership” Troy Nehls offers by pretending this pandemic doesn’t exist so he can get closer to Washington power. Because his actions today are reflective of exactly what he’ll offer us if he wins this race. = = While Troy Nehls downplayed the virus as his own employees got sick, Sri built a grassroots network in our community that shared resources and uplifted each other during this time.
