But to continue that mission, I’m going to need your help. Here’s how you can help, we have our critical FEC End of Month Fundraising Deadline coming up on July 31st, and I must reach this goal to continue my campaign! It’s imperative that I hit this deadline, so I’ve unlocked EXCLUSIVE 300% MATCHING , which means until midnight tonight, all donations will have triple the impact! Will you stand with me, a hometown guy, and help me fight for Long Island? | End of Month Deadline Goal: $25,000 Currently Raised: $12,319.92 Limited 300% Matching: Unlocked A money bomb is a way to give an additional donation of the same amount automatically on a future date.This means you will be charged for a donation equal to the one you make today on July 31st to start our 3rd Quarter with the budget needed to fight Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat Machine* Peter, reaching this End of Month fundraising goal is a critical first step to rebuilding the Republican House majority and taking back Congress! Without your support, we’re at risk of Democrats putting socialist sympathizers like Jackie Gordon in this seat! We can’t afford to cede any more ground in New York to these radical socialists in Congress. ** Thank you, Andrew Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. I've run my last campaign.

But the things that I've fought for my entire career -- the things Joe and I fought for together -- like opportunity, democracy, justice, and progress, are all on the ballot this year.

That is why it is so important that we all do our part to step up and make sure that Joe wins this November. And let me tell you from experience - it's never easy.

So whatever you've done so far is not enough, Peter. I hold myself to that same standard. We all have to do everything in our power -- _every single day_ \-- to win this thing.

| Friends, It was a busy week in the district for me and the team. We traveled to a wonderful event on Saturday for our first responders. It was an honor to spend part of my Saturday with them.
I want to the thank all of our supporters who came to our Meet and Greet at Brooklyn Boy's Pizza. The food was terrific, but the conversation was better. I look forward to getting back to Keystone Heights soon!

Kat

Based on this performance and many other personal experiences with Kat, as well as her management of Congressman Yoho's office, I know she is prepared to serve our district. Therefore, I hereby enthusiastically endorse Kat Cammack to be our next Congresswoman."

I’m doing all I can to stop him, but I’m afraid that without your help, Schumer may get his way. We may lose the Senate majority.
That’s why I’ve decided to set my End of Month goal for July at DOUBLE what I had originally planned for.
That means that if you’ve ever been on the fence about chipping in... NOW is your time.
In order to make sure that we BEAT this massive goal, I’m also setting a goal of 200+ supporters from your area, Peter. I need you to be one of those 200 supporters – I need you to chip in anything you can now! **July End of Month Goal**

body:
We're thrilled to have Sen. Booker's support. |
---
Friend,

All of us here on Team Ossoff are so excited to have the support of Sen. Cory Booker.

Getting the endorsement of key leaders like Sen. Booker is crucial in a neck-and-neck race that could decide control of the U.S. Senate.

Jon Ossoff's campaign for Senate is surging as we head into the final days of July.

**[Read Cory Booker's message below, and chip in right now to make sure we keep up our momentum by reaching our end-of-month fundraising goal.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f80/2512062046/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk")**

---
| [Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f84/2512062046/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk_ex_100")

---
Thank you,

Team Ossoff

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Cory Booker
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** Monday, July 27
**Subject:** Today, join me in supporting Jon Ossoff

Friend,

In this November's election, we have an opportunity to renew hope in America's future.

**That starts with taking back the Senate -- which is why it's my honor to endorse my friend Jon Ossoff in his U.S. Senate race in Georgia.**

I can't overstate how critical it is that Democrats retake a majority in the Senate.

**_And friend, Jon's race could decide control of the Senate!_**

Jon's campaign is surging. He's taken a small lead in the polls, but the race is a true toss-up.

**[We won't flip the Senate this November if we don't win competitive races like Jon's. That's why I'm asking you to chip in $10 right now to help Jon Ossoff and turn the Senate blue.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f86/2512062046/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk&amount=10")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [Express Donate: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f83/2512062046/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk_ex_10")
---
| [Express Donate: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f82/2512062046/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk_ex_20")
---
| [Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f85/2512062046/VEsHBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk_ex_50")
---
| [Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f84/2512062046/VEsHBA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk_ex_100")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f87/2512062046/VEsHBw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk_ex_other")
---
I will be thrilled to call Jon, "Senator Ossoff," next year.

I know he will be a leader in the fight against corruption in Washington and voter suppression across the country.

**And I know Jon, who learned at the feet of his mentor John Lewis, will fight for a new Voting Rights Act.**

_Friend, I don't have to tell you what a major problem voter suppression is in this country. Stacey Abrams would be the governor of Georgia right now if not for massive voter suppression._

Our right to vote is sacred, and protecting it is one of the most important challenges of our time.

**I truly admire Jon's commitment to passing a new Voting Rights Act, and I'm excited to work with him on it in the Senate when we are colleagues.**

Jon Ossoff is someone Georgians can count on to put them first. Mitch McConnell knows Jon Ossoff is a huge threat to his Senate majority, so his dark-money groups are already flooding Georgia with ads to stop Jon.

_Jon can win this race and flip the Senate. But to compete with McConnell's dark money donor network, we need an outpouring of grassroots support from people like you, today._

**[In the most important election of our lifetimes, let's make sure it's a triumphant one for Democrats. Right now, will you make a contribution to elect Jon Ossoff in Georgia and win the Democrats a Senate majority?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f80/2512062046/VEsHBg/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk")**
| [Chip in immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ff/5b2c1286/3e165ac2/25f10f80/2512062046/VEsHAQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_27_end_cb?refcode=em_2020_07_29_end_cbk")
---
Thank you for standing with us,

Cory

name: Maddow Alert (via Blue Georgia)
subject: BREAKING: What Rachel Maddow just said >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Georgia is the number one battleground state
| | |
---
**_BREAKING:_ ****Rachel Maddow warns that voter suppression in Georgia is a "WAKE-UP CALL" for Democrats, says the GOP will try to suppress your right to vote this November! **
|
---
This is urgent, friend: Republicans will do _whatever it takes_ to buy this election and cling to power - and there's simply too much at stake to let them get away with it.
**Right now, polling shows Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) and unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R) NECK AND NECK in Georgia's toss-up race - which _The Washington Post_ says is key to deciding Senate control! **

Expert political analysts from MSNBC to Stacey Abrams are calling Georgia the _number one_ battleground state - so Republicans are pulling out all the stops to hold us back and defeat our people-powered movement.

With Loeffler and McConnell already flooding the airwaves with MILLIONS worth of TV ads - and the GOP _suppressing_ our right to vote - we're going to have to fight TWICE as hard and raise TWICE as much to win.
**That's why this news is so incredible: A group of fired-up donors will MATCH every donation, dollar for dollar - but only until midnight tonight!

We have a _historic_ opportunity to elect voting rights champion Reverend Warnock as Georgia's first Black senator, flip this battleground blue and take back the Senate. But with time running out before our critical match expires, we're still $24,312 short of our goal, and we can't make up the difference without your immediate grassroots support:**

Just last month, we saw historic turnout in the Kentucky primary. Josh won all 19 counties in the district overwhelmingly.
To carry that momentum into the general election, we have to start building our voter turnout operation right now. That includes:
* Reaching out to voters through television ads, digital engagement, mail, and organizing. And we’ll be finding new ways to safely connect with more voters ahead of the election.

* Recruiting volunteers to help with our efforts and reach more people.

* Ensuring voters in KY-06 have the information they need to vote. We’ll need to communicate about voting by mail, voter registration deadlines, and getting people out to vote.

**When you contribute, you’re helping us build the organization we need to win. And polling shows that this district _is_ ready to flip – as long as we all do what it takes to make that happen. **
_**[So, if you can, please help us reach our fundraising goal before July 31!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18461664/229236851/1219571724?amount=28&refcode=HIC_20200729_em_fr_eom3_all_l2_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc5ZWZjMS1lOWQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xGJ5pTJdRQzddueUp_T1Xa3jFXaP8OmcCJnR_EUBZJE=)**_
Thank you for all your support,
Team Hicks

We only have two more days to hit our July fundraising goal, and we're not quite where we need to be yet.

If we miss this target, we'll have to tamp down some of our plans for the next few months -- at a time when we need to be doing everything possible to elect Democrats like Elizabeth across the country.

But if 112 more people from Pennsylvania make a donation right now, we'll be on track to hit our goal.

**[If making a financial contribution makes sense for you right now, can you be one of the 112? Chip in $2 or any amount to help hit this goal and help grow the grassroots movement for big, structural change.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525011/45c30650/1cdcc3374/66e86ecf/3971839269/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDI1Rl9FT01fTUNHX1RfMjAyMDA3MjlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT25F_EOM_MCG_T_20200729_V1S1_P")**

Elizabeth always says that we make each other stronger when we fight side by side -- and there's a lot to fight for in 2020.

We need to sweep Donald Trump and his Republican enablers out of office. We need to elect Democrats who are ready to fight for bold reforms instead of nibbling around the edges. And we need to make sure every voter is able to safely make their voice heard during an unprecedented election season.

That's what Warren Democrats will keep fighting for. And that's what you can support as a grassroots donor with a contribution today.

[112 more donations from Pennsylvania would make sure we're ready to hit this fundraising goal by Friday's midnight deadline. If you can, please make a donation right now, and stay in the fight by Elizabeth's side.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525011/45c30650/1cdcc3374/66e86ecf/3971839269/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDI1Rl9FT01fTUNHX1RfMjAyMDA3MjlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT25F_EOM_MCG_T_20200729_V1S1_P")

clean_body: If we miss this target, we'll have to tamp down some of our plans for the next few months -- at a time when we need to be doing everything possible to elect Democrats like Elizabeth across the country | | | "" We only have two more days to hit our July fundraising goal, and we're not quite where we need to be yet. If we miss this target, we'll have to tamp down some of our plans for the next few months -- at a time when we need to be doing everything possible to elect Democrats like Elizabeth across the country. But if 112 more people from Pennsylvania make a donation right now, we'll be on track to hit our goal. "" Elizabeth always says that we make each other stronger when we fight side by side -- and there's a lot to fight for in 2020. We need to sweep Donald Trump and his Republican enablers out of office. We need to elect Democrats who are ready to fight for bold reforms instead of nibbling around the edges. And we need to make sure every voter is able to safely make their voice heard during an unprecedented election season. That's what Warren Democrats will keep fighting for. And that's what you can support as a grassroots donor with a contribution today. "" Thanks for everything, Team Warren | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

subject: Pelosi pushing Chinese Propaganda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Nancy Pelosi won’t stand up to China. And she won’t point out the fact that China and the Chinese Communist Party are responsible for the global pandemic. Instead, the Speaker of the House has started calling the pandemic the "Trump Virus". This is reprehensible and it shows that there’s nothing too low for Nancy Pelosi. Instead of blaming China, she wants to blame the President.Click here to unsubscribe http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/CottonSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=43070158&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTgwMjI5MjcyOQS2&spReportId=MTgwMjI5MjcyOQS2
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzAxNTgS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMjI5MjcyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Nancy Pelosi won’t stand up to China. And she won’t point out the fact that China and the Chinese Communist Party are responsible for the global pandemic. Instead, the Speaker of the House has started calling the pandemic the "Trump Virus".
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzAxNTgS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMjI5MjcyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0
This is reprehensible and it shows that there’s nothing too low for Nancy Pelosi. Instead of blaming China, she wants to blame the President.

Let’s be clear: The virus originated in China. China covered it up and arrested doctors who tried to warn the world. China corrupted the World Health Organization to downplay the severity of the virus. And China hoarded the world’s supply of protective equipment. That’s why I will continue to point out that this is the China virus.

Do you agree?

If so, sign my petition that Nancy Pelosi’s comments were a disgrace and she should apologize to President Trump. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzAxNTgS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMjI5MjcyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

In fact, while Nancy Pelosi was out selling the myth that President Trump was wrong for opposing the Chinese Communist Party, President Trump was busy banning travel from China. Nancy Pelosi is more concerned with attacking President Trump and being politically correct than she is with standing up for American values against the Chinese Communist Party.

Sign my petition if you agree Nancy Pelosi’s comments were a disgrace and she should apologize to President Trump. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzAxNTgS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMjI5MjcyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 In service,Tom Cotton

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20in=20Office?=
subject: 96 DAYS
body:
We have no choice but to ask, can you dig deep and do what you can to help us keep going? | | | |
---
| | |
---
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=805978e921&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
### Dear Friend,

Did you see our founder, Simona Grace talk to [TYT](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=983a48f639&e=3f151f8b74) about our work changing the game for women running for office in 2020?

Moms in Office is getting noticed nationally because what we have done is nothing short of amazing. As a group of women in politics, we formed a national coalition of moms to help elect well-qualified, hard-working candidates who will be our champions in Congress.

We are leveling the playing field for them so that they can level the playing field for us. Moms in Office could not have done this without you. In Q2 our PAC became a leading organization in our country supporting moms with the most small-dollar donations received amongst similar democratic groups.

Can you help us keep the momentum going? We are falling short of our fundraising goal for July and we must [raise another $5,000 in the next 2 days](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=9f212a46be&e=3f151f8b74) in order to endorse a new slate of candidates. Your contribution will go directly to women candidates running for office on our next slate. Can't wait to share more!

Please chip in what you can, even[ $3](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=48e8dfd08b&e=3f151f8b74) will get us closer to our goal.

Thank you for all of your help!

Moms in Office

---

You can [update your preferences](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74&c=a9f16795fd).

clean_body: We have no choice but to ask, can you dig deep and do what you can to help us keep going? | | | | | | | | "Chip in" | Dear Friend, Did you see our founder, Simona Grace talk to about our work changing the game for women running for office in 2020? Moms in Office is getting noticed nationally because what we have done is nothing short of amazing. As a group of women in politics, we formed a national coalition of moms to help elect well-qualified, hard-working candidates who will be our champions in Congress. We are leveling the playing field for them so that they can level the playing field for us. Moms in Office could not have done this without you. In Q2 our PAC became a leading organization in our country supporting moms with the most small-dollar donations received amongst similar democratic groups. Can you help us keep the momentum going? We are falling short of our fundraising goal for July and we must in order to endorse a new slate of candidates. Your contribution will go directly to women candidates running for office on our next slate. Can't wait to share more! Please chip in what you can, even will get us closer to our goal. Thank you for all of your help! Moms in Office | "Chip in $3" | | Founder of Moms in Office Simona Grace speaks with Cenk Uygur on The Conversation about her efforts to expand how many mothers get elected to public office. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.momsinoffice.org | | Copyright © 2020 Moms in Office, All rights reserved.

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Time is running out - can you please help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends -- National Republicans and the whole MAGA machine are coming after the New Hampshire Senate seat.
The latest update? **Corey Lewandowski -- following Donald Trump's lead -- endorsed my right-wing self-funding opponent, vowing to do everything he can to turn the Granite State red in November.**
Lewandowski and Trump are all-in to defeat me because they know that winning here would put an end to Democrats' chances of taking back the Senate. Analysts at CNBC are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators in the country -- which is why national Republicans are pouring millions into this race to buy this seat and protect their Senate majority.
**We cannot afford to lose this race if we want to take back the Senate for Democrats.** But time is running out on July, and we're falling short of our critical $40,000 goal. I'm asking you to contribute now to get us back on track.
Please -- I could really use your help: [**Please rush $3 or as much as you can to defend New Hampshire's Senate seat from Trump and Lewandowski and take back a Democratic Senate!**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5ef/2a380d31/235fda1c/f0a8a9/2682764406/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA3MjlfTVdINENKU19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20200729_MWH4CJS_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

subject: We have to keep this momentum going!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We had record turnout in the Texas runoff, but Sen. Cornyn has already started launching attacks against MJ.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eae/7f51f7bc/400db6d2/4ef7ba68/2654775246/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Peter,

Thanks to help from this grassroots team, **we had _record turnout_ in the Texas runoff.** Now we need to keep that momentum going through the general election so we can beat Sen. Cornyn and FLIP THE SENATE on Election Day!

But **Sen. Cornyn has already started launching attacks against MJ** (thanks to help from his special interest allies and corporate PAC donors), and we need your help to fight back.
[MAKE A MATCHED DONATION TO HELP MJ FLIP TEXAS!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eae/7f51f7bc/400db6d2/4ef7ba6f/2654775246/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3OTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200729.2nd__1794__&amount=10")
---
**This Friday marks our first end-of-month deadline since winning the runoff,** and we need to make sure we keep reaching our goals in order to build the movement we need to defeat Sen. Cornyn and flip Texas.

**All donations before Friday 's midnight deadline are being MATCHED, so pitch in now to double your impact and help us reach our 500 new donor goal!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Hello, We’re a little short of our end-of-month fundraising goal and need your help to make up the difference before we close the books on our most important goal yet. The people of South Jersey are ready for change, and Amy is ready to fight for affordable health care, protecting workers’ rights, and rebuilding our economy. **But with just three months until Election Day, we need to raise as much as we can now in order to make the big investments that put us in the best position to win.** Trump is pulling out all the stops to protect the turncoat Congressman Jeff Van Drew’s seat and keep a loyal ally in Congress. name: Professor Leah Stokes
subject: I study power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We can make climate a top priority.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb) Friend, | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/659?t=3&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb)
---
When I first heard about Jay Inslee's Climate Mission agenda, I was excited. The idea that someone would run for president on a bold climate agenda was unthinkable just two years ago. Fast forward to today, and we have Evergreen Action working every day to turn that agenda into policy.
**When I was asked to join Evergreen's advisory board, I didn't hesitate. I was thrilled to be part of this movement for climate action.** I've been working on climate change issues for the past 15 years. Currently, I'm a political science professor at the University of California, Santa Barbara, where my research and teaching focuses on energy, climate, and environmental politics. My work revolves around power -- both the energy our world runs on and the people and corporations who control it.
We're seeing the way that power can corrupt our institutions right now in Ohio. Just last week, the FBI arrested the state's Speaker of the House, Rep. Larry Householder, for allegedly accepting more than $60 million in bribes from the utility companies FirstEnergy and AEP. This included half a million dollars that personally benefited Rep. Householder -- paying for back taxes on his vacation home, his legal bills, and his reelection. What's more, FirstEnergy flew him to Trump's inauguration on their corporate jet.
In return for these personal favors, the Speaker passed a bill that gutted the state's renewable energy and energy efficiency standards while bailing out three coal plants. Unfortunately, this kind of corruption is not an aberration for the electric utility industry. As I document in my book, _**[Short Circuiting Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/657?t=4&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb)**_ , across the country, most private utilities are resisting the clean energy transition, and many are buying off politicians with campaign contributions to do it.
But despite the millions of dollars these utilities are using to try to corrupt our democracy, _we the people_ have the power. And we must speak up to our present and future leaders to keep our clean energy transition on track.
**[If you believe the power of the people is greater than the power of the corrupt fossil fuel and utility industries, add your name today to tell Democratic candidates, including Joe Biden, that climate must be a top priority in their campaigns and once they are elected.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/659?t=5&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb)**
[MAKE CLIMATE A TOP PRIORITY ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/659?t=6&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb)
---
The team at Evergreen has crafted a detailed, substantive plan that envisions a better future for all of us. The Evergreen Action Plan calls for a bold national 100% Clean Electricity Standard by 2035.
Thanks to the investment of time and effort from activists like you, Joe Biden listened. He has incorporated many Evergreen policies into his new climate plan, including major new investments in a clean energy-led economic recovery and a robust Clean Electricity Standard for utilities. When I heard about these commitments, I felt hope in a way I haven't for years. We can clean up our electricity system and stop the utilities from continuing to promote dirty energy.
I'm thrilled about this plan. Now, I want to see it prioritized.
**[If he's elected, Joe Biden can't let climate change fall to the bottom of a long to-do list. Sign on now and make sure he knows we need to make this a priority -- because, as Jay Inslee has said, if it's not job #1, it won't get done.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/659?t=7&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb)**
Thanks so much for everything you're doing. Stay in the climate fight!
Professor Leah Stokes
Author, _**[Short Circuiting Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/657?t=8&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb)**_
Evergreen Advisory Board Member
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/659?t=9&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1765%2E53494%2E4iZcNb). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

I had a front row seat to Joe's leadership when he and President Obama successfully pulled our country out of the deepest recession since the Great Depression, and we urgently need to elect a president capable of meeting such a task head-on once again.

Joe Biden has the policy experience to craft sweeping solutions, the humility to defer to our nation's top experts, and the compassion required to look out for each American family as he'd look out for his own. With just three months to go until November 3 and two days until Friday's critical deadline, I'll ask once more:

[**Will you chip in $5 -- or anything you can -- to make sure we can put Joe Biden in the White House and turn the page on this dark chapter in America's story? body:
Hint: Answer in this email. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| This has been a very busy summer for the Students for LaTurner team. We've been putting in thousands of hours as we work hard to earn your votes. It has been so great talking **to over 112,000 Kansans** at their doorstep or on the phones. We are doing everything we can to win this race. _**We won't be outworked.**_

The finish line is in sight (just 6 days away!), and we are sprinting all the way through it. We'd love to have your support.

Would you consider [helping us with a donation to the campaign](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6db5c50bc6&e=1050d051da), which will allow us to speak directly with thousands more voters before election day?
---
|
---
|
---
---
| We really appreciate your support of the Students for LaTurner effort. We are putting a great deal of energy into this campaign, and we cannot do it without you. Would you consider [helping us with a donation to the campaign](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=30199acd31&e=1050d051da)?

Your contribution will help Jake LaTurner win the primary and it will help us **Take Back the House from Nancy Pelosi and keep this seat RED!**
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: LIVE: President Trump discusses restoring American energy dominance
body:
Today, President Trump will address Americans from the Permian Basin in Texas, which stretches nearly 86,000 square miles into New Mexico. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57c74ac5fe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 29, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE: President Trump discusses restoring American energy dominance**

🎬 [**Watch live at 4:20 p.m. ET: President Trump speaks in Texas**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f4ba701bdc&e=3ee4985eea)

**Today, President Trump** will address Americans from the Permian Basin in Texas, which stretches nearly 86,000 square miles into New Mexico. Both these states have helped America lead the shale oil and natural gas revolution that is changing the world.

**Upon taking office,** President Trump ended the war waged on American energy by the previous administration. Rather than expand the reach of bureaucrats, President Trump rolled back overregulation, ended stifling rules, and unleashed energy resources.

**The results** of American energy dominance couldn’t be clearer:
* **America is leading** the world in oil and natural gas production.

* **U.S. energy exports** reached an all-time high last year, marking the first time in _67 years_ that our annual gross energy exports exceeded imports.

* **Oil production** has soared, surpassing records that stood for nearly half a century.

**This energy dominance** means more affordable utilities and gas prices for families, more jobs for American workers, and less reliance on unstable foreign energy sources.

**Shale-driven improvements** have reduced the global price of oil by 10 percent. According to the Council of Economic Advisers, these price decreases alone save American consumers $203 billion annually—an average of $2,500 for a family of four.

**These savings** equal nearly 7 percent of income for the poorest fifth of U.S. households.

**Most important** , President Trump’s agenda of U.S. energy dominance is good for both for the economy and for our environment. Key pollutant concentrations are down since 2017, with lead down 28 percent and sulfur dioxide down 10 percent. Additionally, the electricity sector has reduced per unit carbon dioxide emissions by 15 percent relative to 2017 government forecasts when President Trump took office.

**President Trump** wants even more of this American innovation to drive results for consumers, workers, and our environment. The left, meanwhile, wants more government mandates to create jobs for lawyers, lobbyists, and politically connected industries.

**American energy dominance** may be bad news for the bureaucrats, but it’s great news for your family, your community, and our country.

[MORE: The value of U.S. energy dominance!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc69f99779&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump arrives in Midland, Texas **| July 29, 2020
---
|

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18463195/229282439/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ2NDg3YS1mZGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yhFGq5pHAwmzF8Ru1twHtgxx9gcmrc94cc9J_sw-whI=&emci=3a250e73-fdd1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=9146487a-fdd1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Hey, We’re in the middle of an exciting moment in U.S. history. There is a new movement emerging, and new allies are standing up to dismantle the systemic racism that still plagues our country. Now more than ever, we need more representation and Black leaders in Congress. I’m proud to be running for U.S. Senate in South Carolina, alongside several Black candidates, including my brother, Mike Espy in Mississippi. Mike shares my vision of a South that is based on boldness, diversity, and inclusion. I’m honored to be fighting alongside him to make it a reality. [**Can you rush a $10 donation between my campaign and Mike Espy’s before the July fundraising deadline to help flip our seats blue and elect more Black leaders to the U.S. Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18463196/229282440/-755728571?refcode=em-200729-harrison&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ2NDg3YS1mZGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yhFGq5pHAwmzF8Ru1twHtgxx9gcmrc94cc9J_sw-whI=) Our opponents, Lindsey Graham and Cindy Hyde-Smith, have the might of the entire Republican machine behind them. clean_body: | Hey, We’re in the middle of an exciting moment in U.S. history. There is a new movement emerging, and new allies are standing up to dismantle the systemic racism that still plagues our country. Now more than ever, we need more representation and Black leaders in Congress. I’m proud to be running for U.S. Senate in South Carolina, alongside several Black candidates, including my brother, Mike Espy in Mississippi. Mike shares my vision of a South that is based on boldness, diversity, and inclusion. I’m honored to be fighting alongside him to make it a reality. = Our opponents, Lindsey Graham and Cindy Hyde-Smith, have the might of the entire Republican machine behind them. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Social gatherings
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I've promised from the beginning of this crisis to always be transparent with you about our decision-making process. Every choice we make is backed by the science and data available to us, and you deserve to know exactly how those decisions happen. Today, I made the decision to keep Rhode Island in Phase 3 for another month with one change - the social gathering is now lowered to 15. I want to walk you through exactly why.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NVkq3k-aqtR9g8653Zjk6yv7wREFkAQHpoZsriQz927VsNsMb0nToTjU_l1G56Koymlo00b6G9S6x3SpTh610kjIfIqynkQIfQv9ibEMvFbgJqY2bjyANN0T9f3XrhpIuA8sM7NVa1OB880lakvFWl6RLORPu1ZdwNd6rpKZf6MBH3-cUmScN6ub08OkhLGZ28pQFFEG5M=&c=YD7b-4p0CKbuSHc8TWyTd611rlCEGJXH6Wu8ZwDhvVbhyc2cwi26Pw==&ch=tqu5IP_wI-2XJzrABb5W5gOWocBUuB_ohcchwKSRfxgW3GLoUYe3ZQ==)
---
| In a deep-data-dive of 4,000 positive cases in Rhode Island, the Department of Health found a clear trend: large social gatherings continue to be a problem. We had cases traced back to a house party with more than 50 people; to a baby shower; to a large birthday party at a bar; to a backyard BBQ; to a pool party; to a sports team banquet. In each of these instances, the patterns were the same - people were gathering in groups, mingling, not wearing a mask, and not socially distancing. Often we traced many cases back to the same social event.
This reality is also reflected in a slight uptick in our state's rate-of-spread. In the slide below, you can see the four metrics we track when we think about our phases of reopening.
---
|
---
| Based on this data, it's clear we're not ready to move forward into another phase, but we don't need to move back a phase either. As we've done all along, we're taking a targeted, data-driven approach to address the trends we're seeing. That's why we are extending Phase 3 for another 30 days - through August 28 - with this one change to social gatherings. This is important for a few reasons. First, we know that social gatherings above 15 people have been the source of many of our positive cases. Second, we know from our contact tracers that people who attended gatherings above this size had difficulty recalling the names of people they were with, and many were not keeping contact tracing journals. And third - our top priority is getting our numbers low enough that we can safely send kids back to school.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NVkq3k-aqtR9g8653Zjk6yv7wREFkAQHpoZsriQz927VsNsMb0nTvbqrFQsL8yg6XKCFWGDbyqp93YfMzNW1oFxdAmftK3nBqNVeihZP1LVvD1Wfeaxh2mNGZwdXhPd5xtiB_LFdyze_1NPBbzZkTiNPl6JairVZ_rjPtDOrOKx4VPvOPtd6kFl9V-KwKhg9vSVS46Gd60=&c=YD7b-4p0CKbuSHc8TWyTd611rlCEGJXH6Wu8ZwDhvVbhyc2cwi26Pw==&ch=tqu5IP_wI-2XJzrABb5W5gOWocBUuB_ohcchwKSRfxgW3GLoUYe3ZQ==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NVkq3k-aqtR9g8653Zjk6yv7wREFkAQHpoZsriQz927VsNsMb0nTvbqrFQsL8yg6XKCFWGDbyqp93YfMzNW1oFxdAmftK3nBqNVeihZP1LVvD1Wfeaxh2mNGZwdXhPd5xtiB_LFdyze_1NPBbzZkTiNPl6JairVZ_rjPtDOrOKx4VPvOPtd6kFl9V-KwKhg9vSVS46Gd60=&c=YD7b-4p0CKbuSHc8TWyTd611rlCEGJXH6Wu8ZwDhvVbhyc2cwi26Pw==&ch=tqu5IP_wI-2XJzrABb5W5gOWocBUuB_ohcchwKSRfxgW3GLoUYe3ZQ==).
---
| We cannot let social gatherings stand in the way of our ability to open schools and businesses safely. We have seen so many people and businesses find creative ways to keep things fun while following the rules. And that approach has worked. It's one of the reasons Rhode Island is not facing the same kind of spike that we have seen in other states across the nation. The credit for Rhode Island's great numbers goes to people like you - the people who have been following these updates, wearing your mask, and staying socially distanced. We can get through this, but only if we engage with each other openly and honestly about the risks we're facing. We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=2ca2bc07-b935-41c0-ac13-c3702fc7fcc2)
---

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, I've promised from the beginning of this crisis to always be transparent with you about our decision-making process. Every choice we make is backed by the science and data available to us, and you deserve to know exactly how those decisions happen. Today, I made the decision to keep Rhode Island in Phase 3 for another month with one change - the social gathering is now lowered to 15. I want to walk you through exactly why. | == | In a deep-data-dive of 4,000 positive cases in Rhode Island, the Department of Health found a clear trend: large social gatherings continue to be a problem. We had cases traced back to a house party with more than 50 people; to a baby shower; to a large birthday party at a bar; to a backyard BBQ; to a pool party; to a sports team banquet. In each of these instances, the patterns were the same - people were gathering in groups, mingling, not wearing a mask, and not socially distancing. Often we traced many cases back to the same social event. This reality is also reflected in a slight uptick in our state's rate-of-spread. In the slide below, you can see the four metrics we track when we think about our phases of reopening. | | Based on this data, it's clear we're not ready to move forward into another phase, but we don't need to move back a phase either. As we've done all along, we're taking a targeted, data-driven approach to address the trends we're seeing. That's why we are extending Phase 3 for another 30 days - through August 28 - with this one change to social gatherings. This is important for a few reasons. First, we know that social gatherings above 15 people have been the source of many of our positive cases. Second, we know from our contact tracers that people who attended gatherings above this size had difficulty recalling the names of people they were with, and many were not keeping contact tracing journals. And third - our top priority is getting our numbers low enough that we can safely send kids back to school. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | We cannot let social gatherings stand in the way of our ability to open schools and businesses safely. We have seen so many people and businesses find creative ways to keep things fun while following the rules. And that approach has worked. It's one of the reasons Rhode Island is not facing the same kind of spike that we have seen in other states across the nation. The credit for Rhode Island's great numbers goes to people like you - the people who have been following these updates, wearing your mask, and staying socially distanced. We can get through this, but only if we engage with each other openly and honestly about the risks we're facing. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

subject: Derek, you're what keeps us moving forward

Derek --

Republicans in Virginia have raised over **$12 million** so far to defeat Mark and flip Virginia red. Republican PACs, special interest groups, and GOP donors are pouring money into the Commonwealth to support his GOP opponent and roll back the progress we've made in Virginia. **If we 're going to keep Mark in the Senate fighting for us, we need your support _now_.**

**[If you're able, will you pitch in to help us meet our end-of-month goal?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db8a/53d9897e/541c7794/1c885f2b/2888360158/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julyeom2?refcode=20200729_f_2_nd_v1__680__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Mark narrowly won his race in 2014 -- by a less than a 1% margin. We're now less than 100 days from Election Day 2020, and we can't afford to take anything for granted, especially with the investment that the GOP is making in the Commonwealth this year. Mark can win and protect the progress we've made in Virginia, but we're going to need all hands on deck.

We need to hit our end-of-month deadline on Friday to stay on track with our fundraising and make sure Mark wins big on Election Day. **If you have the means, will you help us reach our goal?**

name: UPDATE - Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Fwd: David Perdue's anti-Semitic ad against me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Let's not allow Perdue to get away with this. |
---
Hi friend,

**Did you have a chance to read Jon Ossoff's message yesterday?**

**On Monday, we learned that his opponent, Senator David Perdue, had been running a digital attack ad that doctored Jon's face to enlarge his nose.** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10b7d/432463819/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as") Senator Perdue is STILL not taking responsibility for his extremely obvious anti-Semitic attack against Jon, seen by thousands.

**Frankly, we are sick and tired of our representatives refusing to take responsibility for anything.**

The division and pain across our country must be met with political leadership that brings us together.

**Instead, Senator Perdue sees himself in a neck-and-neck race with Jon and is stooping low into the gutter to save his job.**

_We can't let Perdue get away with this._

**[Please read Jon's message below, and chip in $5 to end David Perdue's career.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10b7c/432463819/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as&amount=5")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Express Donate: $5](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10b7f/432463819/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as_ex_5")
---
| [Express Donate: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10b7e/432463819/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as_ex_10")
---
| [Express Donate: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10a81/432463819/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as_ex_20")
---
| [Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10a80/432463819/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as_ex_50")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10a83/432463819/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as_ex_other")
---
Thanks for being with us,

Team Ossoff

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** Tuesday, July 28
**Subject:** David Perdue's anti-Semitic ad against me

Friend, I am disgusted -- but I can't say I'm surprised.

My opponent, sitting U.S. Senator David Perdue, ran a digital attack ad that distorted my face to enlarge and extend my nose.

[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10b7c/432463819/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as&amount=5") **I'm Jewish. And this is the oldest, most obvious, least original anti-Semitic trope in history.**

No, Senator Perdue has not apologized to Georgia's Jewish community. Of course he hasn't. He hasn't said a word.

But, friend, ultimately this isn't about Senator Perdue.

It's about a climate of hatred and bigotry that has been deliberately stirred up by Donald Trump since he descended on a golden escalator in his skyscraper to announce his presidential campaign.

> \- When he called Mexican immigrants "rapists."
> \- When he called white supremacists "very fine people."
> \- When he tweeted "White Power" videos.
_And on and on and on._

**Friend, the people of Georgia and this country deserve so much better.**

We deserve leaders who uplift and unite us, who call us to be kind and compassionate, who build a stronger and more just nation defined by our shared values and aspirations.

That's the America I believe in. That's the America we will build when we defeat the likes of David Perdue and Donald Trump on November 3.

**The only remedy is victory. And to win, I need your support.**

**So let's respond to David Perdue's anti-Semitic attack ad by building more unstoppable grassroots energy. He's only stooping to these tactics because I've caught up with him in the polls.[Will you contribute $5 right now?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10b7c/432463819/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as&amount=5")**

| [Chip in $5 now >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10b7c/432463819/VEsHBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?refcode=em_2020_07_29_jo_as&amount=5")
---
Thank you for standing with me.

With love,

Jon
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ Click here to receive fewer emails.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10a82/432463819/VEsHBA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/less-emails-new") | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10a85/432463819/VEsHBw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/content/unsubscribe")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10a82/432463819/VEsHAQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/less-emails-new") If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10a85/432463819/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/content/unsubscribe")

Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to electing Jon Ossoff and helping Democrats win back the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21f5/5b2c1286/3e15391d/25f10a87/432463819/VEsHAw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_HP_X_footer_X__X__X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700&recurring=auto") Thanks for having Jon's back!

subject: [You're Invited] "Build Back Better" Economic Equity Virtual Event with Cory Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Join us! |
---
Peter -- On Friday, July 31, Senator Cory Booker will host a virtual roundtable with voters and leaders in Philadelphia to discuss the fourth plank of Joe Biden's "Build Back Better" economic recovery plan for working families.

Senator Booker will highlight how Biden's plan will address systemic racism and advance racial economic equity in Pennsylvania and across America. **[Click below to RSVP and receive a Zoom registration link:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b991/1cd0ac28/1771dc9f9/357d1cbc/1983691717/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/joebiden/event/292796/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.29_B8_BBB-Booker_X__F1_S1_C1_PA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.29_B8_BBB-Booker_X__F1_S1_C1_PA")** | | **" Build Back Better" Economic Equity Virtual Event with Cory Booker** Friday, July 31, 2020

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b991/1cd0ac28/1771dc9f9/357d1cad/1983691717/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b991/1cd0ac28/1771dc9f9/357d1ca5/1983691717/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b991/1cd0ac28/1771dc9f9/357d1ca4/1983691717/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b991/1cd0ac28/1771dc9f9/357d1ca9/1983691717/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b991/1cd0ac28/1771dc9f9/357d1ca2/1983691717/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

If the Senate flips, we are in huge trouble. Socialist initiatives like the Green New Deal and Defunding the Police will become the new normal in this country. subject: Republicans are trying to cut aid for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/57241e387979/republicans-are-trying-to-cut-aid-for-working-families?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Republicans have once again shown their true colors. As unemployment benefits are set to expire for the millions of Americans who have lost their job due to the COVID-19 pandemic, the Republicans have proposed a bill that they say is aimed at relief for Americans, but all it provides is a relief for their corporate donors.

The misleadingly titled "HEALS" Act proposed by **Republicans would cut unemployment benefits in the middle of a pandemic, while also making it virtually impossible to hold corporations accountable when their employees get sick after coming back to work. **

[Click here to chip in and help unseat a vulnerable Republican!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ff48315339&e=140a9b81e7)

Republicans like my opponent Adam Kinzinger have decided to use this crisis to help their corporate donors, which is the exact opposite of what the American people need. **We need expanded relief funds for families and an extension of unemployment benefits. So many people are simply running out of time for relief. **

This wildly irresponsible legislation is another reminder that this November we need to fight back and make sure we unseat every single Republican that is vulnerable. **With your support, I can defeat Adam Kinzinger and make sure the people of IL-16 have a Representative who will fight for working families.[Click here to make a donation and join me in this fight. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=da73757de5&e=140a9b81e7)**

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

This wildly irresponsible legislation is another reminder that this November we need to fight back and make sure we unseat every single Republican that is vulnerable. With your support, I can defeat Adam Kinzinger and make sure the people of IL-16 have a Representative who will fight for working families. Friend, I wouldn't email unless it were incredibly important, so believe me when I tell you:
**Our people-powered movement to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate is surging - but Kelly Loeffler is spending $20 million of her own fortune to buy this seat, and a McConnell-linked super PAC just booked more than $8 million in attack ads to protect the GOP's extremist majority.**
There's something incredible happening in Georgia and across the country. Experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to _The Washington Post_ confirm that Democrats can take back the Senate - and it could all come down to whether or not we win this battleground state. With polls showing this race statistically tied, McConnell and the GOP have never been more vulnerable.
**But I need your help:** Loeffler and McConnell are flooding the airwaves with attack ads, threatening to tear down everything we've built. This could ruin our chance to finish the work that Stacey Abrams started in 2018 and take back the Senate for Democrats - unless we raise another $7,483 before our critical match expires. With just a few hours to go, we're still falling dangerously short.
**Here's the thing: If everyone reading this email chipped in even just a few dollars now, we'd hit our goal in minutes. But I know not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you, friend:** **[Will you give $5 or more right now and have every dollar doubled to help us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e229/288179be/91a0db9/348e0457/4092182097/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDM1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk435-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for chipping in when this team needs you most.
Raphael Warnock
